title: Fused advantage normalization (whiten + mask)
summary: Two-pass Triton whitening helper that fuses normalization and masking for already-computed advantages.
success_gate: Preserve whiten+mask semantics and only use the fused path when it wins representative advantage-normalization shapes.

results.note: Reduces 3 passes to 2 (accum + apply). Used by REINFORCE++ and GRPO advantage pipelines.

notes: Normalized from the legacy task-card schema on 2026-04-03 to restore queue validation.
